name: job-board-scout
description: Custom MCP tool: readJobs extracts job listings (title, company, location, url) from any board.

tools.name: readJobs
tools.description: Extracts job listings (title, company, location, url) from the currently-open job board / results page. Pass `url` to target a specific page. Self-contained: if that page isn't open it returns {status:"navigate_required", navigateTo}.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is the final result.
